<!-- Chart CH-SPA-04 DOT DENSITY, role-based (themeable) -->

## DOT DENSITY chart (CH-SPA-04)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-SPA-04",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "density",
    "distribution",
    "pattern"
  ],
  "form": "one dot per declared count at supplied coordinates",
  "data_required": "base polygons + dot coordinates; each dot a declared unit",
  "family": "SPA",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-SPA-01 (rates by region)",
    "CH-COR-05 (abstract xy density)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "region-level rates suffice",
      "use": "CH-SPA-01"
    },
    {
      "when": "no geography",
      "use": "CH-COR-05"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- spatial concentration where the cluster shape matters
- showing crowding that region averages would hide

Do NOT use when:
- few items (plot them as labeled symbols)
- precise counts (dots are for pattern, the key gives scale)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the cluster",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "thing counted",
  "unit_value": "count per dot, declared",
  "note": "coordinates are author-supplied unit-square (0-100) geometry; the renderer scales, the author owns projection and aspect",
  "regions": "base polygons",
  "dots": "[[x,y]..]"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 120,
      "right": 840,
      "top": 110,
      "bottom": 470
    },
    "label": {
      "size": 12
    }
  }
}
```

### Rules
- the dot key (one dot = N) is printed; dots are pattern, not lookup
- dot placement is supplied data, never renderer randomness

### Never do this
- renderer-side random scatter (breaks determinism)
- reading individual dots as items
- undeclared dot value

### QA before delivering
- [ ] dot key printed
- [ ] supplied coordinates only
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| dot | primary |
| label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
